name: spec-graph-monorepo
description: spec-graph v3: declaration engine — dispatch manifest generator + gate evaluator. Meta-repo with packages as git submodules.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @spec-graph/core && npm run build -w @spec-graph/cli
scripts.test: npm run test -w @spec-graph/core && npm run test -w @spec-graph/cli

author: spec-graph team
